task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Jenkins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins dashboard or interface is visible, showing the user is logged in (e.g., 'admin' user profile, logout button, or the main Jenkins dashboard is accessible).

task_completion.description: Verify the new job 'Regression-Test-Runner' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The job 'Regression-Test-Runner' appears in the Jenkins dashboard list, or its specific job page/configuration page is visible with this exact name.

task_completion.description: Verify the description of the new job is correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration page for 'Regression-Test-Runner', the Description text area contains exactly: 'Runs full regression tests against staging environment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the build command of the new job contains the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration page for 'Regression-Test-Runner', the 'Execute shell' build step text area contains the modified command including the keywords 'TEST_SUITE=regression', 'TARGET_ENV=staging', and '142/142'.

task_completion.description: Verify the original job 'Smoke-Test-Runner' still exists and was not simply renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins dashboard shows both 'Smoke-Test-Runner' and 'Regression-Test-Runner' jobs, or there is clear evidence during job creation that 'Smoke-Test-Runner' was used in the 'Copy from' field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Jenkins web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Jenkins UI to copy and configure the job, rather than using a terminal to run curl/jenkins-cli commands.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots show a real Jenkins environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Jenkins elements (logo, breadcrumbs, sidebar menus) rather than a mocked text file or generic editor.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made through normal form inputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools open to fake the UI text; changes should be typed into the actual configuration text areas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source Job: 'Smoke-Test-Runner'. Target Job: 'Regression-Test-Runner'. Expected Description: 'Runs full regression tests against staging environment'. Expected Command Keywords: 'TEST_SUITE=regression', '142/142', 'TARGET_ENV=staging'.
